title: SmokeCrunch PaleoWrap
description: A meal-prep Slovakian dish featuring a crispy wrap filled with bacon and lightly smoked vegetables, perfect for a quick breakfast or lunch.
instructions: Toast whole wheat wraps by wrapping them in aluminum foil and baking for 1-2 minutes, or until slightly crisp.
Meanwhile, slice bacon into thin strips. Season with salt and pepper.
Place radish slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Drizzle with a bit of olive oil and season lightly with salt and pepper. Bake for about 5-7 minutes or until crispy.
Assemble the wraps by layering spinach, smoked radishes, bacon strips, cucumber slices, and a drizzle of olive oil on each wrap. Sprinkle with additional salt and pepper to taste if desired.
